SEARCH
Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Games.SearchFilter

All Superinterfaces:
Games.CommonGameParameters<Games.SearchFilter>, Games.EvalsAndPlayers<Games.SearchFilter>
Enclosing interface:
Games
public static interface Games.SearchFilter extends Games.CommonGameParameters<Games.SearchFilter>, Games.EvalsAndPlayers<Games.SearchFilter>

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Games.SearchFilter

    Games.SearchFilter
    analysed(boolean analysed)
    Only games with or without a computer analysis available
    Games.SearchFilter

    Only games played as this color.

    Games.SearchFilter
    lastFen(boolean lastFen)
    Include the FEN notation of the last position of the game.
    Default `false`
    default Games.SearchFilter
    literate()
     
    Games.SearchFilter
    literate(boolean literate)
    Insert textual annotations in the PGN about the opening, analysis variations, mistakes, and game termination.
    Default `false`
    Games.SearchFilter
    max(int max)
    How many games to download.
    Leave empty to download all games.
    default Games.SearchFilter
    ongoing()
     
    Games.SearchFilter
    ongoing(boolean ongoing)
    Include ongoing games.
    Games.SearchFilter
    perfType(Enums.PerfType... perfTypes)
    Only games in these speeds or variants.
    Multiple perf types can be specified.
    default Games.SearchFilter
    perfType(Set<Function<Enums.PerfType.Provider,Enums.PerfType>> perfTypes)
    Only games in these speeds or variants.
    Multiple perf types can be specified.
    default Games.SearchFilter
    rated()
     
    Games.SearchFilter
    rated(boolean rated)
    Only rated (`true`) or casual (`false`) games
    Games.SearchFilter
    since(long since)
    Download games played since this timestamp.
    Default: Account creation date
    default Games.SearchFilter
    since(ZonedDateTime since)
    Download games played since this timestamp.
    Default: Account creation date
    default Games.SearchFilter
    since(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
    Download games played since this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
    Default: Account creation date
    default Games.SearchFilter
    sortAscending()
     
    Games.SearchFilter
    sortAscending(boolean ascending)
    Sort order of the games, based on date.
    Default sort order is descending (i.e "false")
    Games.SearchFilter
    until(long until)
    Download games played until this timestamp.
    Default: Now
    default Games.SearchFilter
    until(ZonedDateTime until)
    Download games played until this timestamp.
    Default: Now
    default Games.SearchFilter
    until(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
    Download games played until this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
    Default: Now
    Games.SearchFilter
    vs(String vs)
    Only games played against this opponent
    default Games.SearchFilter

    Games.SearchFilter
    withBookmarked(boolean withBookmarked)
    Include `bookmarked` (if authenticated) Default `false`

      Only games in these speeds or variants.
      Multiple perf types can be specified.

    • ongoing

      Games.SearchFilter ongoing(boolean ongoing)
      Include ongoing games. The last 3 moves will be omitted.
      Default: false

    • ongoing

      default Games.SearchFilter ongoing()

    • finished

      Games.SearchFilter finished(boolean finished)
      Include finished games. Set to false to only get ongoing games
      Default: true

    • finished

      default Games.SearchFilter finished()

    • sortAscending

      Games.SearchFilter sortAscending(boolean ascending)
      Sort order of the games, based on date.
      Default sort order is descending (i.e "false")
